import io
import string

fn upper_first(_ line: String, _ start: Int, _ stop: Int) -> String
  let first_b = match string.byte_at(line, start)
  when Some(b)
    b
  when None
    0
  end
  if first_b >= 97 and first_b <= 122
    let upper = first_b - 32
    let rest = string.substring(line, start + 1, stop)
    "#{string.from_byte(upper)}#{rest}"
  else
    string.substring(line, start, stop)
  end
end

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let n = string.len(line)
mut result = ""
mut first = true
mut word_start = -1
mut i = 0

while i < n
  let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  let is_ws = b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
  if is_ws
    if word_start >= 0
      let word = upper_first(line, word_start, i)
      if first
        result = word
        first = false
      else
        result = "#{result} #{word}"
      end
      word_start = -1
    end
  else
    if word_start < 0
      word_start = i
    end
  end
  i = i + 1
end

if word_start >= 0
  let word = upper_first(line, word_start, n)
  if first
    result = word
    first = false
  else
    result = "#{result} #{word}"
  end
end

println(result)
